name: @cureocity/live-gateway
description: Sprint DV4 — standalone WebSocket streaming gateway for the doctor live copilot. Vercel can't hold a socket, so the live path runs as its own in-region service. Runs the real pipeline (Pass 1 transcription + Pass 2 medical note + gap engine) on streamed PCM audio; LLM_BACKEND=mock for local dev, vertex for real.
